_comment: Create flow — conflict management (Figma Flow — Compact Card Stack `20879:15979`)

page.compactTitle:
How should conflicts be managed
in your group?
page.expandedTitle: How should conflicts be managed in your group?
page.expandedDescription: You can also combine or add new approaches to the list

peer-mediation.label: Peer Mediation
peer-mediation.supportText: Trained members within the organization mediate disputes among peers.

conflict-resolution-council.label: Conflict Resolution Council
conflict-resolution-council.supportText: Senior members with institutional knowledge provide guidance or decisions.

facilitated-negotiation.label: Facilitated Negotiation
facilitated-negotiation.supportText: A neutral facilitator helps guide the negotiation process.

ad-hoc-arbitration.label: Ad Hoc Arbitration
ad-hoc-arbitration.supportText: Arbitrators are chosen specifically for a particular case.

conflict-workshops.label: Conflict Workshops
conflict-workshops.supportText: Structured sessions where parties collaboratively resolve disputes and improve future interactions.
